title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Don Chinjao, Marines, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as luffy’s battle with Chinjao reaches its peak, proving his strength and reshaping Chinjao’s hatred into recognition.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: However

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: As the leader of the Happou Navy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I will have revenge for my fallen comrades!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: strong!!! That's has- Shoken!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Sai has shown us the true nature of a commander!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He brought down that formidable monster Kelly with just one kick...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You will atone, Strawhat Luffy ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: For the crime of your grandfather!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He stole a great fortune from me!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: My power too....!! and the memo- Ries from the spring- time of my youth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Like I said...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't know about any of that, so talk to grandpa!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Death would be too mild a punishment for one such as GARP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He will live... but I will make him know the pain of loss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Dedede

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: his grand- father is... Garp!! So it really is him after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You!! Give me back my helmet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wah

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just try and take it ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you can make it this far!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GIHAiqu!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've really pro- fitted a lot these past two years, and it's all thanks to you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmmm!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've already collared a bunch of prisoners

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: that you helped escape from the great prison Impel down!! DEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDEDE!!

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
